title: Minecraft7tv
description:
Minecraft 7tv is a fabric mod that brings to minecraft the extraordinary experience of using emotes while chatting.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f0kpISL69yk
body:
Minecraft 7tv is a fabric mod that brings to minecraft the extraordinary experience of using emotes while chatting.

This mod uses emotes from 7tv.

[Showcase](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f0kpISL69yk)
 

Features: 

STBImage implementation to render images.
Infinite capacity of emotes.
Uses ImageMagick to convert image files to renderable gifs.
Server emote list to use with your friends.
Chat customization.
 

How to use it:

Open the menu with a custom keybind at Minecraft7tv, the menu has 5 sections:

Emotes: 
      All the emotes will be displayed here with their name, if you hover the top part you will be able to edit and remove the emote.

Add emote:
      The emotes are added here, there are two text field widgets, the one at the top for the new emote name and at the other one you need to give the emote link obtained from here emotes, you can find more information  clicking the  guide button at the bottom part of the menu.

Emote settings:
      All the emote related settings will be found here.

Server settings:
      All the server related settings will be found here.

Settings:
      All the mod related settings will be found here.

Once an emote has been added you will be able to us e it, just write it name at the chat!

 

Commands:

/client7tv serverEmotes -> requests server emote list, if the list has more than 10 emotes a file will be created at .minecraft/config/Minecraft7tv/server_emotes with all the emotes
/client7tv sync -> syncs all server emotes with your client.

 

Server:

Minecraft7tv has a server implementation. This one brings: 

Server emote list: Every user in the server that has minecraft7tv mod (client) will be able to use server emotes. (Toggeable at the settings)
Server emote editors: People with Server Emote Editor role will be able to add and remove server emotes. (They are saved with uuid)

 

Commands:

/7tv emotes add-remove <name> <link> -> adds/removes a server emote, second parameter not necessary when removing.
/7tv editors add-remove <playerName> -> adds/removes a server emote editor roles. 
/7tv editors -> lists all emote editor roles in the server.

 

Future features:

Emote size fix, each emote has his dimensions, right now all emotes have predefined size that you can change at emote settings.
Stacking emotes, one of the last features of 7tv, stacking two emotes.
Sharing emotes.
